title: parasenecio delphiniphyllus
intro: Parasenecio delphiniphyllus, also known as the Delphinium-leaved Senecio, is a plant species within the dandelion family that has been used for its medicinal properties. It contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which are toxic to the liver and should be used with caution. However, when used correctly, it has been reported to have a number of health benefits, including aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
